name: Homemade Croutons
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the light oil to the melted butter.
3. Mix in the minced garlic, thyme, and oregano.
4. Cut 5 loaves of day-old bread into cubes (about 1/2 inch).
5. Remove the crusts from each cube.
6. Toss the bread cubes with the garlic mixture until evenly coated.
7. Arrange the seasoned bread cubes on a baking sheet in a single layer.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 20-25 minutes, or until lightly browned and crispy.
